attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUPS_B.GROUP_ID, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUPS_B.GROUP_NUMBER, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUPS_B.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUPS_B.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUPS_B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUPS_B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUPS_B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUPS_B.EXCLUSIVE_FLAG, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUPS_B.START_DATE_ACTIVE, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUPS_B.END_DATE_ACTIVE, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUPS_B.ACCOUNTING_CODE, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUPS_B.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUPS_B.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUPS_B.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUPS_B.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUPS_B.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUPS_B.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUPS_B.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUPS_B.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUPS_B.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUPS_B.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUPS_B.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUPS_B.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUPS_B.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUPS_B.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUPS_B.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUPS_B.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUPS_B.EMAIL_ADDRESS, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUPS_B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUPS_B.SECURITY_GROUP_ID, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUPS_B.TIME_ZONE, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUPS_B.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUPS_B.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUPS_B.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUPS_B.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUPS_B.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUPS_B STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUPS_B,
(
 select GROUP_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUPS_B
 minus
 select GROUP_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_JTF_RS_GROUPS_B
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.GROUP_ID = STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUPS_B.GROUP_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_JTF_RS_GROUPS_B.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_JTF_RS_GROUPS_B)
